SFRA (Signal Forward Return Analysis): For each stock, we scanned its full history and found every past StealthTrail BUY signal. We then measured how much the stock rose over the next 5 / 10 / 20 / 30 trading days after each signal. Hit Rate = % of past signals where the 20-day return was positive. Avg 20d = average 20-day forward return across all past signals. This tells you how reliable a signal has been for this specific stock historically.

§4   Visualisations

RRG Scatter (Static)

Top Stock Picks — Score Chart

📖 How to Read This Report

ROTATING ★★★ (≥12)
Leading SPY + StealthTrail active + 3–4 confirmation signals. Act now.
ROTATING ★★ (9–11)
Improving vs SPY with 2+ signals. Enter smaller, add on confirmation.
WATCH ★ (6–8)
Early rotation — not yet fully confirmed. Set price alerts.
AVOID (<6)
Lagging or Weakening vs SPY. No new positions.
3-Layer Stock Filter
1. RRG vs SPY → beating market?
2. RRG vs Sector → best in sector?
3. StealthTrail + 4-Factor → entry confirmed?
Backtest Columns
QTA: Quadrant Transition Analysis — after sector enters Leading.
SFRA: Signal Forward Return Analysis — after stock's BUY trigger.
Both show n (past signals), Avg 20d return, Hit Rate.
